PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED JAN-28-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, DINORA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-13-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DINORA TORRES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TORRES, DINORA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $935.29 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEM LLC
